response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus open-source contributions and leadership in dev practices. His only minor gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but his adaptability and depth compensate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across enterprise-scale systems
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Strong DevOps and testing culture with hands-on experience in CI/CD, GitLab, Vitest, and TDD
concerns: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in recent roles, though Node.js and TypeScript experience is robust
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (pre-2020); recent work focuses on TypeScript and DLang
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
